failure_movement.justification: Previous iter-23 clusters are null so no actual prev->actual delta exists to verify movement. Prediction assumes empty=4 but actual empty=0; claims wrong shrinks from iter_020 baseline (not iter_023). With no verifiable prior cluster, direction is plausible but unconfirmable. Partial credit for identifying wrong/unknown as key clusters.

trace_movement.justification: Prediction claims top hits retain 6-7 sentences; actual top-8 avg ~8.4 sentences (higher). Contiguous block structure is directionally plausible from retrieved data but unverifiable. No prior token baseline (iter-23 tokens=null) so +30-60 token rise claim cannot be confirmed. Partial credit for structural plausibility.

side_effects.justification: Prediction warns of token consumption rise—plausible given 1703 avg total but no baseline to confirm delta. Prediction says empty=4 stable but actual empty=0 (wrong assumption). Regression risk on 1-2 tasks vaguely aligns with multi-session 0.48/temporal 0.54 weak spots but prediction did not name these types specifically.
